title: createContext
description: Creates a context for passing data through the component tree without props.
param_default_value_desc: Optional. Value returned by <0>useContext</0> when no Provider exists above.
usage_declaring_the_context: The site publisher declares an <0>AwsContext</0> that carries a region and an S3 client. Its default is <1>null</1>, so components can detect when no <2>AwsProvider</2> is above them.
usage_providing_a_value: <0>AwsProvider</0> creates the S3 client once and exposes it through <1>AwsContext.Provider</1>. Every descendant that publishes an object shares this one connection.
in_the_wild: See this provider wire up S3 in the <0>site-publisher walkthrough</0>.
